feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Do we have the relevant S4 HANA standard V2/V4 API for the BAPI "BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_POST"?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As part of clean core methodology we need to implement the similar call of posting the activity hours on WBS timesheet in S4 from CPI. A similar BAPI "BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_POST" is there but wanted to know do we have the relevant S4 HANA standard V2/V4 API for similar BAPI functionality?

Thanks,

Ahmed

entry.title: Write PDF to Azure Blob Storage
entry.content:
Hi Community

I've created an iFlow that attempts to write a PDF (binary data payload) to an Azure blob storage using the corresponding Azure API. The upload fails with the response "Content-Length HTTP header is missing" even though the header parameter is present in the request (nevertheless with a value drastically different from the value that e.g. is sent using Postman where it works without any issue).

I've seen some discussions around that topic, but none that really helped me solve the problem. Did anybody encounter this issue as well and found a solution or has a working scenario?

Thanks,
Daniel

entry.title: Error When execute API : Cannot connect to host zeus.hana.prod.eu-central-1
entry.content:
Hello

In step 4 "Execute API" of the tutorial "Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API and Test the Flow" I have the following error message

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?><error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"><code/><message xml:lang="en">

Exception [EclipseLink-4002] (Eclipse Persistence Services - 2.7.8.v20201217-ecdf3c32c4): org.eclipse.persistence.exceptions.DatabaseException
Internal Exception: com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: Cannot connect to jdbc:sap://zeus.hana.prod.eu-central-1.whitney.dbaas.ondemand.com:22716 [Cannot connect to host zeus.hana.prod.eu-central-1.whitney.dbaas.ondemand.com/18.196.126.43:22716 [java.net.ConnectException: error 111 - Connection refused], -813.].
Error Code: -813
Call: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, CATEGORY, CATEGORY_NAME, CURRENCY_CODE, DIMENSION_DEPTH, DIMENSION_HEIGHT, DIMENSION_UNIT, DIMENSION_WIDTH, LONG_DESCRIPTION, NAME, PICTURE_URL, PRICE, QUANTITY_UNIT, SHORT_DESCRIPTION, SUPPLIER_ID, WEIGHT, WEIGHT_UNIT, SUPPLIER_SUPPLIER_ID FROM ESPM_PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_ID LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'
bind => [1 parameter bound]
Query: ReadAllQuery(referenceClass=Product sql="SELECT PRODUCT_ID, CATEGORY, CATEGORY_NAME, CURRENCY_CODE, DIMENSION_DEPTH, DIMENSION_HEIGHT, DIMENSION_UNIT, DIMENSION_WIDTH, LONG_DESCRIPTION, NAME, PICTURE_URL, PRICE, QUANTITY_UNIT, SHORT_DESCRIPTION, SUPPLIER_ID, WEIGHT, WEIGHT_UNIT, SUPPLIER_SUPPLIER_ID FROM ESPM_PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_ID LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'")</message></error>

entry.title: Schedule a job for SAP integration suite iflow from SAP Job scheduler Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is it possible to schedule a job for SAP integration suite iflow from SAP Job scheduler Service?

Any suggestions or steps are appreciated.

entry.title: Replicate and modify xml node using XSLT
entry.content:
Hello

XSL gurus, will appreciate if someone can guide me for below issue in XSLT (3.0 version is ok).

Req is to replicate <RETAILLINEITEM/item> node and also modify some values based on some condition.

Condition/rule to replicate and modify is

TRANSTYPECODE = 1003 and RETAILTYPECODE = 2003

<SALESAMOUNT> field to be multiplied by -1.

Input payload:

<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>01962</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE>1003</TRANSTYPECODE>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>0</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2003</RETAILTYPECODE>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<RETAILQUANTITY>1</RETAILQUANTITY>
<SALESUOM>PCE</SALESUOM>
<SALESAMOUNT>4.44</SALESAMOUNT>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXNUMBER>1</TAXNUMBER>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZST1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>0.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

<RETAILLINEITEM/item> should be copied and also amount values to be multiplied by -1

Output payload:

<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILSTOREID>01962</RETAILSTOREID>
<TRANSTYPECODE>1003</TRANSTYPECODE>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>0</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2003</RETAILTYPECODE>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<RETAILQUANTITY>1</RETAILQUANTITY>
<SALESUOM>PCE</SALESUOM>
<SALESAMOUNT>4.44</SALESAMOUNT>
</item>
<!-- Below item node should be copied from above and <salesamount> should be multiplied by -1 -->
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>0</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2003</RETAILTYPECODE>
<ITEMIDQUALIFIER>1</ITEMIDQUALIFIER>
<RETAILQUANTITY>1</RETAILQUANTITY>
<SALESUOM>PCE</SALESUOM>
<SALESAMOUNT>-4.44</SALESAMOUNT> <!-- Negative amt -->
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
<TAX>
<item>
<TAXNUMBER>1</TAXNUMBER>
<TAXTYPECODE>ZST1</TAXTYPECODE>
<TAXAMOUNT>0.00</TAXAMOUNT>
</item>
</TAX>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

entry.title: Combining Responses from HTTP adapter in CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a flow where I am posting each record in S/4 and getting a document number against each successful posting. If the source file having 10 records, then I have to capture 10 document numbers from the responses and combine them and log as a text file.

Updated with 2 records and the response text are coming as below. Nedd to combine 2 & 3 body with newline and log that as text file

 

Please suggest how can this be achieved.

entry.title: Read SFTP Sender Excel file sheetname in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a scenario of getting an XLSX file from an SFTP (sender) using SAP CPI and sending to SAP S4. Here I need to get the sheet name before conversion to xml but I don't know how to do this reading to an Excel file.

Kindly share the groovy script code to read this before using converter class to convert to xml.

entry.title: How to get data sent from Gmail in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Since SAP Integration Suite can use IMAP and POP3 protocols, how can I use these protocols to receive emails in CPI?
What are the requirements for the sender side? If you have any experience with this, please respond.

entry.title: Groovy or XSLT to remove XML Tag(not values) in sap cpi payload
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a XML payload from which I need to remove only the XML tag and the values should pass to the parent tag. Sample payload mentioned below -

I tried few groovy functions mentioned on the community but that is replacing the entire <AdditionalComments/> tag to blank which is not expected.

Please help me if we can take this with groovy or I need to go with XSLT?

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: OAuth Client Credentials Along with User Password Credentials in SAP CPI Receiver
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement where we need to post the json payload to HTTP URL using OAuth Client credentials (along with username and password credentials). This works fine with the POSTMAN but I am unable to implement the same in the CPI IFlow. I am working on NEO Tenant.

 

Please suggest.

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Preceding Whitespace is trimmed when an IDoc is sent from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hi all,

We are sending an IDOC from SAP Integration suite to SAP ECC systems, but noticed preceding whitespace is being trimmed in a field when it reaches SAP ECC. The logic in mapping is such that if we have more than 70 characters in file name , then a new segment gets created with remaining characters of filename. And when the 71st character is a whitespace this is being trimmed at SAP ECC.

When we switch on trace or simulate it in Integration Suite the space is visible , but is missing when we check the same in SAP ECC systems.

We tried the same example via SAP PO and noticed the space appearing in SAP ECC.

Filename Example - Batch HF_ID225test_2024xxxxxxxxxx_xxxxx_x_xxx 2024 036_xxx_an_xxxxxxxx Seeds_20240912.pdf

Could someone suggest if this is standard behavior of SAP Integration Suite or if there is any standard solution to achieve expected outcome in SPA ECC  

SAP IS simulation

SAP ECC

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: CI/CPI: When exactly will the Apache Camel Upgrade to 3.14 take place?
entry.content: When exactly will the Apache Camel Upgrade to 3.14 take place on CI/CPI tenants (DEV/TEST/PROD)?

entry.title: Messages between Iflows from different Runtimes
entry.content:
Hi there,

is there a way to send/receive messages from one runtime to another with an "internal" method.

I would like to get incoming requests from the cloud integration runtime. Ideally i could address the message via jms or ProcessDirect to route it to the runtime of the edge integration cell. I don't want to use an extra instance of an cloud connector for that matter. This would cost extra ressources and extra messages would be applied. 

Are there any solutions?

Kind regards,

Florian

entry.title: how to transform xml from one format to other
entry.content:
input format :

<Values>
<Value AttributeID="edi" ID="13" Changed="true">WERA</Value>
<Value AttributeID="multiVendor" ID="14" Changed="true">1234</Value>
<Value AttributeID="vendorSubType" ID="15" Changed="true">Warehouse</Value>

</Values>

Required Format:

<Values>
<edi>
<Changed>true</Changed>
<ID>13</ID>
<text>WERA</text>
</edi>

<multiVendor>
<Changed>true</Changed>
<ID>14</ID>
<text>1234</text>
</multiVendor>

<vendorSubType>
<Changed>true</Changed>
<ID>15</ID>
<text>Warehouse</text>
</vendorSubType>


</Values>

please help me in converting xml its  urgent.

entry.title: MDR proxy - Recommendations/ Guidelines
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We have CPI not PI/ PO. Planning to use MDR proxy for the consumer proxies to avoid any manual creation of WSDLs. 

Any bottlenecks or recommendations or guidelines that would help is appreciated. 

Please share your recommendations

entry.title: AIF monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently using SAP PO/PI 7.5 as Integration platform with in our landscape..

To do AIF(application interface framework) monitoring, to see the end to end message flow from/to S4/ECC regarding outbound/inbound interfaces we have customized Fiori page...

we are using the Fiori page for the following cases..

(i) AIF Messages (ii) AIF Monitoring (iii) Interface monitoring...

In that Fiori page, it shows status of the messages on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. also if someone clicks on SAP PO status "hyperlink" of that specific message then it re-directs to the SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message... it is possible to link SAP backend and SAP PO messsage on Fiori page because message ID for outbound messages is same on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. it is easier to fetch SAP PO status of the specific message...

Fiori page with SAP PO Message status Hyperlink (here "Success" is hyperlink)..

SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message

We are planning to migrate all the interfaces from SAP PO/PI to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)..

Now, what are different alternate options available within SAP BTP to cater this requirement..

1. BTP Based Fiori app 

2. SAP Cloud ALM for end to end monitoring..

AFAIK, the option 1) above is expensive since Fiori developers has to put of lot of efforts to build such app for AIF monitoring.. Could option 2) completely replace the above solution implemented in SAP PO/PI?? Could you please let me know which is better option in terms various factors like Cost, efforts, time to develope/implement, SAP recommendation, standard solution etc.., Thank you!

//Ramu

entry.title: Access a property in message mapping from a content modifier
entry.content:
I have this groovy script 

import com.sap.it.api.mapping.*;
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
/
def String getProperty (String Almacen_Codigo, MappingContext context) {
String value1 = context.getProperty(Almacen_Codigo);
return value1;
}

This script "getProperty" was created   to access the property "Almacen_Codigo"  of type xpath declared in a previous content modifier , but is not reading the property for some reason, the STGE_LOC xpath refers to a value 

please do someone know?

entry.title: print push integration (SAP_COM_0467)
entry.content:
Hi 

We are in the process of implementing external printing or OMS on S4 Public Cloud using SAP BTP print service, integration suite and CPM, but we are having an issue with the SAP_COM_0647 (Push integration) which seems to only trigger or send a notification to call a BTP integration suite endpoint when you open or refresh the Maintain Print queue app and not when there is a new queue item added. 

Regards

JP

entry.content:

when I set a api, i get this error,someone can help me ?

entry.title: SAP BTP Integration Suite artifact upload issue using CI/CD pipeline
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am getting this error "Integration flow project must contain a manifest file" while running a job for Integration suite artifact using CI/CD.

I have down loaded the  Integration flow artifact as zip file .

 

Thanks,

Ravi
